key_insights.insight: It is crucial to bootstrap a business as long as possible to validate the idea and increase the company's value before raising venture capital.
key_insights.quote: Get as far as you can before raising a single dollar. Validate your idea as soon as you can with the ugliest, like most basic, quickest thing.

key_insights.insight: Building a strong community around a brand is more valuable than focusing solely on metrics.
Naivety can be a strength for innovation, but it must be balanced with convention for long-term survival and sustainability.
key_insights.quote: The naivety made us interesting but our naivety will also send us to the grave here if we're not yeah if we don't know what we don't know.

key_insights.insight: Entrepreneurs should trust their intuition, as it's what made them special in the first place.
key_insights.quote: Listen to your gut...you should also always maintain and continue to cultivate a voice that when you know it should is able to supersede any advice that anybody gives you.

key_insights.insight: Aim for a reasonable valuation during fundraising to make your company an attractive acquisition target.
key_insights.quote: When you do raise money, having a reasonable valuation is important.

key_insights.insight: Self-doubt, when harnessed effectively, can be a tool for self-awareness and accountability.
key_insights.quote: It's fun to have a dark counterpoint to hold yourself accountable and be like, maybe it is that or not that.

key_insights.insight: When entering a new space, an outside perspective can lead to radical and unique connections.
key_insights.quote: I think it's okay to feel like an outsider or an imposter sometimes because you find yourself in places where you have an outside perspective and are able to learn things.

actionable_advice.advice: Validate business ideas quickly and cheaply before investing heavily.
actionable_advice.how_to: Create a basic version of the product and get it in front of potential customers to assess its value.

actionable_advice.advice: When raising venture capital, get as far as possible before taking any money
actionable_advice.how_to: Bootstrap as long as possible to increase your company valuation

actionable_advice.advice: When raising venture capital, aim for a reasonable valuation.
actionable_advice.how_to: Avoid being overpriced, which can make you unattractive for further investment or acquisition.

memorable_stories: Stealing books from Barnes & Noble to sell on Amazon to pay rent.
Getting arrested for shoplifting a shopping cart full of random goods, including a George Foreman grill and organic tampons.
Shaving everything but the hernia to entertain her boyfriend.
contrarian_claims: The claim that sometimes the valuation of the company is celebrated at 350 million valuation is the nail in the coffin. It eventually imploded her company due to the high expectations and the valuation. She claims they rounded up by 100 million dollars.
episode_title: The Diary Of A CEO with Steven Bartlett - NastyGal Founder: I Was A Stripper! A Shoplifter! Then Built A $400m Business! Sophia Amoruso
